voices.name: Jamie Dimon
voices.quote: ‘The banks will not accept it’: Dimon escalates battle over stablecoin rewards in CLARITY Act debate

voices.name: Scott Bessent
voices.quote: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US has seized roughly $1 billion in Iranian crypto assets, double the figure disclosed in late April.

news.title: What would cause the Fed to hike rates this year? The answer might surprise you.
news.summary: Later this month, the Kevin Warsh-led central bank will start preparing a possible pivot to tighter policy.

news.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see record 10-day outflow streak, analyst calls it ‘contrarian indicator’
news.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged a record 10-day outflow streak totaling nearly $3 billion, while Ether ETFs bled for 14 consecutive sessions.

news.title: Bitcoin treasury space still has fair share of ‘carnival barkers’: BSTR founder
news.summary: BSTR co-founder Sean Bill says many Bitcoin treasury companies lack the “ability to actually deploy Bitcoin.”

news.title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in Iranian crypto, Treasury secretary says
news.summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US has seized roughly $1 billion in Iranian crypto assets, double the figure disclosed in late April.

news.title: Bitcoin, ether, XRP, dogecoin lag a nine-week stocks rally as ETF demand cools
Bitcoin’s biggest quantum risk may not be wallet keys. An early investor fears something bigger
Bitcoin retail sentiment still matters, says Swan Bitcoin CEO
news.summary: Swan Bitcoin CEO Cory Klippsten said it is important to pay attention to retail sentiment around Bitcoin, as ownership is still far from concentrated and “it’s not like Blackrock owns the Bitcoin.”

news.title: Bitcoin dip buyers place $500M in bids as $70K retest looms
news.summary: Over $500 million in Bitcoin bids now sit near $70,000, while options traders and futures positions converge around the same level.

news.title: ‘Extraordinarily unusual’ for CFTC to reverse Gemini settlement deal: Ex-chair
news.summary: As the CFTC and Gemini work together to seek a court's reversal of a 2025 settlement, one of the agency’s former chairs said the public “deserves a better explanation.”

news.title: Jim Cramer says Dell’s blowout quarter sets up a crucial week for AI stocks
news.summary: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said Dell Technologies’ blockbuster quarter reignited enthusiasm around AI and data center stocks.

news.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
news.summary: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.

news.title: A mystery man tried to buy Playboy’s high-end lingerie business. It turned out to all be a scam.
news.summary: Prosecutors say Kevin Juin used money he raised to buy the company Honey Birdette to purchase luxury watches, jewelry, private-club memberships and OnlyFans subscriptions.

news.title: Gap and American Eagle shares both get crushed — and neither retailer is blaming the economy
news.summary: Despite earnings that underwhelmed investors, executives at both Gap and American Eagle Outfitters said nothing is wrong with the economy.

news.title: ServiceNow’s stock soars to a historic month as AI fears fade across software
news.summary: ServiceNow shares gained over 40% this month, leading an industrywide relief rally among enterprise software companies.

news.title: Software stocks wrap up best month since 2001 as talk of 'SaaSpocalypse' subsides
news.summary: Snowflake and Okta both saw record stock pops this week as investors found favor in their AI software strategies.

news.title: Dell’s stunning 33% stock rally gave a big boost to shares of other server makers
news.summary: Dell’s blowout earnings report is highlighting how the AI buildout is also driving demand for old-school computing.

news.title: CFTC backs crypto perpetual contracts, issues advisory on 24/7 trading
news.summary: The CFTC issued notices affecting platforms seeking to offer cryptocurrency perpetual futures contracts, including a no-action position for Coinbase and approval for Kalshi.

news.title: Stocks close at record highs with tech leading the way again. Nasdaq gains 8% in May
news.summary: U.S. equities closed at record highs on Friday, while crude prices slipped, helping the major averages score a winning month, boosted by technology.

news.title: Dell stock skyrockets 32% for its best day ever as AI server revenue soars
news.summary: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.

news.title: Wall Street rides high into June on hopes that the war will soon come to an end. Here's what's ahead
news.summary: The stock market continues to bet on some sort of resolution being found with Iran. But there is also no shortage of other risks heading into a new month.

news.title: ‘The banks will not accept it’: Dimon escalates battle over stablecoin rewards in CLARITY Act debate
Morgan Stanley says these 'dividend hopefuls' are poised to outperform if they initiate a payout
news.summary: Dividend stocks may help boost investor returns over time, and Morgan Stanley thinks a number of companies are in a position to begin paying them.

news.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
news.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

news.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
news.summary: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example of "AI psychosis.” Indeed, ClickUp recently cut 22% of its workforce for AI agents, tech layoffs in 2026 are already nearly matching all of 2025, […]

news.title: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
news.summary: The exchange's integration with Deribit gives eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures markets.

news.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
news.summary: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.

news.title: Bitcoin plums new six-week lows as analyst eyes BTC price dip 'end' at $72K
news.summary: Bitcoin saw its lowest levels since the middle of April as BTC price action continued ot diverge from thriving US stock markets.

news.title: Ex-Celsius CEO files motion to vacate sentence after lawyers withdraw
news.summary: Former CEO Alex Mashinsky filed documents seeking to vacate his 12-year sentence, which included claims involving FTX and a “hostile takeover” by a former Celsius executive, who was sentenced to time served.

news.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
news.summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.

news.title: U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto, may not be fit for other sectors

news.summary: Dell reported blowout fiscal first quarter results on Thursday thanks to booming AI server demand, leading many analysts to raise their price targets.

news.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
news.summary: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

news.title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
news.summary: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.

news.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
news.summary: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.

news.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $2.8B in record nine-day outflow streak
news.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a nine-day outflow streak totaling $2.84 billion, surpassing an eight-session outflow run in February 2025.

news.summary: If you're looking for a fun way to connect with nature while collecting bird species on an app like Pokémon, give this smart feeder a try.

news.title: Paxos wins SEC approval to clear U.S. stocks on blockchain
How the ‘double scar’ of past inflation woes and geopolitical shocks amid the Iran war is hitting consumers
news.summary: Mental "scars" reinforce fears of stagflation, when rising prices coincide with declining growth, research finds.

news.title: Bitcoin falls out of the global top 10 assets as market cap dips below $1.5T
news.summary: Bitcoin’s market cap has dropped below $1.5 trillion, pushing it out of the world’s top 10 assets amid AI stock and precious metal rallies.

news.title: Hyperliquid bigger than NASDAQ, says ICE CEO Jeffrey Sprecher
Strategy situation ‘out of hand,’ says Arca exec on $15B preferred stock burden
news.summary: Strategy’s capital structure may be under pressure as Arca’s Jeff Dorman highlights $15 billion in preferred stock obligations and CEO comments on possible Bitcoin sales.

news.title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
news.summary: South Korean chip startup XCENA is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.

news.title: Texas Bitcoin reserve plans shift from ETF to direct BTC custody
news.summary: Texas is hiring a crypto custodian to move its $10 million Strategic Bitcoin Reserve from BlackRock’s IBIT ETF into directly held coins and build full state‑level BTC plumbing.

news.title: Bitcoin underperforms risk assets as record 9th day of ETF outflows signal waning demand
DxSale drained for $7.3M in BNB Chain liquidity exploit
news.summary: DxSale was drained for about $7.3 million from BNB Chain liquidity providers, raising fresh concerns over old DeFi locker contracts.

news.summary: OKX Ventures and KIS to invest $53 million each for a 19.6% stake in Coinone, deepening ties between traditional finance and crypto in South Korea’s tightly regulated market.

news.title: SEC approves Paxos as ‘blockchain-native’ clearing agency
news.summary: Paxos says its approval as a blockchain-focused clearing agency represents a “critical piece of financial market infrastructure” as Wall Street becomes more interested in crypto.

news.title: Bitcoin, ether little-changed despite record stocks, falling oil and easing war fears
Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
news.summary: CryptoQuant says that the holding structure for large Bitcoin holders is deteriorating, a trend that has historically preceded “sustained price weakness.”

news.title: Bitcoin's record holder supply hides a buyer drought, CryptoQuant says
Bitcoin’s trapped under $74K while $9B options expiry looms: Are bears back in control?
news.summary: Bears hold the upper hand for Friday's $9 billion options expiry, keeping Bitcoin under pressure amid heavy ETF outflows and corporate selling

news.title: Glean’s top line crosses $300M as AI budget cutting becomes its major selling point
news.summary: The enterprise AI search startup tripled its annual revenue even as tech giants entered the category.

news.title: ECB appoints three Directors General
Calamos bets protected Bitcoin ETFs can outlast crypto market swings
The internet is being rebuilt for machines
news.summary: As AI agents move from experiments to production, AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated internet traffic instead of human users.

news.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder StackAI
news.summary: Asana will incorporate StackAI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

news.title: Crypto trading firm FalconX confidentially files with SEC for IPO, hires bankers
Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
news.summary: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

news.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
news.summary: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

news.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
news.summary: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.

news.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary
news.summary: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

news.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
news.summary: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

news.title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
news.summary: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.

news.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
news.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank

news.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
news.summary: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone Siri app.

news.title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
news.summary: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.

news.title: Fed’s Kashkari tells CNBC that inflation fight takes priority as labor market is 'in decent shape'
news.summary: The Minneapolis Fed President warned that persistently high inflation risks becoming embedded in consumer expectations, potentially forcing tougher policy action later.

news.title: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition: 'We are on the lookout'
news.summary: A $20 billion deal would be among the largest in JPMorgan's history and could invite regulatory scrutiny given its position as the largest U.S. bank by assets.
